title: spermacoce dibrachiata
intro: Spermacoce dibrachiata, also known as Spermacoce obtusifolia or Scutellaria obtusifolia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an anti-diarrheal agent. The herbal preparations of Spermacoce dibrachiata include infusions, decoctions, and infusions made from its leaves, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
